occupation: Senior Director, Enterprise Solutions at Vistar Media
headline: Senior Director, Enterprise and Publisher Solutions, Vistar Media

experiences.title: Senior Director, Enterprise Solutions
experiences.description:
Vistar Media is the leading programmatic technology company for digital signage and digital out-of-home (DOOH), offering a fully integrated SaaS platform that enables automated, data-driven advertising across signage networks and retail media environments. Our full stack includes a DSP, SSP, ad server, and CMS — powering both loop-based and impression-based delivery with advanced capabilities in audience targeting, forecasting, dynamic pacing, and unified auction mediation.

As a senior member of the Enterprise Solutions team, I serve as a strategic advisor and subject matter expert on monetization, operations, and platform integration. I partner with media owners, retailers, and technology providers to modernize infrastructure, activate first-, second-, and third-party data strategies, and drive adoption of Vistar’s platform through scalable, API-driven integrations.

My work enables clients to unlock new revenue streams, maximize yield, and maintain control — while accessing the industry’s largest pool of programmatic demand for digital signage.

experiences.title: Enterprise and Publisher Solutions, Business Development
experiences.description:
Vistar Media offers a complete end-to-end programmatic ecosystem to help businesses get the most out of digital out-of-home media. This includes a demand-side platform (DSP), supply-side platform (SSP), and digital signage software (our ad server and content management system, Cortex) — all integrated together to enable data-driven, automated, measurable DOOH transactions.

It’s mission is to help marketers engage with consumers in compelling ways through digital out-of-home and to maximize the potential of every media owner’s inventory. Vistar Media has been recognized as one of AdExchanger’s 2021 & 2020 Top Programmatic Power Players, The Drum Digital Advertising Awards “Best Use of OOH,” The 2019 Innovator Awards’ Best Ad Platform, and 2018 Inc.’s Best Workplaces (to name a few).

In my position on the Publisher Solutions team, I am responsible for creating partnerships with digital out-of-home networks, integrators, and technology firms. Our solutions typically serve to optimize operations, monetization, and yield across DOOH networks. Notably, Vistar gives media owners access to the largest single source of programmatic DOOH buyers in the world.

experiences.title: Director of Business Development, GameStop Media
experiences.description: Responsible for managing sales and operations of the GameStop TV network, as well as omni-channel brand partnerships with GameStop.

experiences.title: Brand Manager - GameStop TV & Live Nation Concert Vision
experiences.description:
Managed the overall operations and marketing of the GameStop TV network. Provided leadership to CBS Outernet support staff, marketing, and sales teams.

Mastered and effectively communicated the key benefits and value propositions of CBS Outernet media as they related to advertising clients. Produced marketing materials and initiatives to generate endemic and non-endemic client revenue.  Monitored and reported on industry trends and target account strategies. 

Developed long term strategic relationships with key accounts. Liaison with GameStop digital and retail channels to build integrated marketing packages. Launched new advertising offers, initiatives, content strategies and inventory, driving an incremental 22% of revenue in FY2013.

Provide detailed inventory analysis and reporting to CBS Outdoor Executives and Senior Management. Cultivated industry relationships for new product development. Managed network audience measurement, ROI attribution, and market research studies.
